headline: Is It Time To Reassess Block (XYZ) After Its Recent Share Price Rebound?
summary: Wondering if Block is priced for opportunity or already ahead of itself? This article walks through the numbers behind the share price so you can judge the value story with more confidence. After closing at US$71.26, the stock has returns of 14.6% over 7 days, 20.0% over 30 days, 9.4% year to date, 32.2% over 1 year, 12.3% over 3 years and a 71.1% decline over 5 years, which gives a mixed picture of how sentiment has shifted over different time frames.
